channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Court of Appeal Grants Interim Stay Restoring JSC's Complaint Processing Role
item.description: The Court of Appeal has issued an interim stay, suspending a High Court decision that had blocked the Judicial Service Commission (JSC) from handling complaints against judges and judicial officers. T...

item.title: South African Fuel Prices Set to Increase in April Amid Global Oil Price Rise
item.description: South African drivers are likely to face significant fuel price hikes in April 2026, with increases potentially reaching up to R8 per litre. This surge follows a sharp jump in the rand price of Brent ...

item.title: Saudi Arabia Steps Up Diplomatic Talks with Iran Amid Middle East Conflict
item.description: Saudi Arabia has accelerated its diplomatic engagement with Iran in an effort to prevent the escalation of conflict in the Middle East, which has already affected global markets. Using back-channel co...

item.title: Six Spanish Female Directors Promoting Linguistic Diversity Through Cinema
item.description: Spain's film industry, historically dominated by male directors and the Spanish language, is witnessing a shift thanks to pioneering female filmmakers and supportive organisations like CIMA (the Assoc...

item.title: The Risks of U.S. Support for Iranian Kurdish Opposition Forces
item.description: As the Iranian regime faces significant pressure from U.S. and Israeli military action, Washington has reportedly explored the idea of supporting Kurdish opposition groups in Iran to destabilize the c...

item.title: Spain Partially Evacuates Personnel from Tehran Embassy Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: In response to escalating tensions in the Iran conflict during early March 2026, Spain has taken measures to ensure the safety of its diplomatic personnel in Tehran. The Wall Street Journal live cover...

item.title: OpenAI's Head of Robotics Resigns Over Concerns Regarding Pentagon AI Agreement
item.description: Caitlin Kalinowski, who led OpenAI's robotics team after joining from Meta in November 2024, announced her resignation on March 7, 2026, citing ethical concerns related to the company's recent agreeme...

item.title: Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath honours contributions of Govind Ballabh Pant on his death anniversary
item.description: On 7th March 2026, Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath paid homage to Pandit Govind Ballabh Pant, the first Chief Minister of the State and a Bharat Ratna awardee, on his death anniversary at...

item.title: Nigerian Army Lieutenant Reported Missing After Boko Haram Ambush In Sambisa Forest Amid Claims Of No Backup Support
item.description: The family of Lieutenant J.O. Ejeh, a Nigerian Army officer, dey express serious worry over him safety after him unit come under heavy attack by Boko Haram terrorists inside Sambisa Forest for Borno S...

item.title: Common English Mistakes in Tanzanian Newspapers and Proper Usage
item.description: This article points out several common mistakes in English usage by Tanzanian journalists. It begins by clarifying that 'staff' is a collective noun, so saying '20 staff' is incorrect; one should say ...

item.title: Verstappen suffers braking failure and misses qualifying at Australian GP
item.description: Max Verstappen faced an unexpected setback in the Australian Grand Prix qualifying when a sudden braking failure caused him to crash out at turn one of the lakeside circuit. The four-time world champi...

item.title: IPL's success highlights Big Bash League's challenges as India reach T20 World Cup final
item.description: Amid discussions over Australia’s disappointing T20 World Cup performance, India and New Zealand have shown modern Twenty20 cricket at its finest ahead of Sunday’s final. Playing a major tournament at...

item.title: Pastor Peter Akpe Pledges Humble, Service-Oriented Leadership as New Bayelsa Deputy Governor
item.description: Pastor Peter Akpe, di newly sworn-in Deputy Governor of Bayelsa State, don promise to lead with humility, service and collective responsibility. Him talk dis one during reception wey hold for D. S. P ...

item.title: England face deepening crisis after historic defeat to Italy in Six Nations
item.description: England suffered a humiliating and historic 23-18 defeat to Italy in Rome during the 2026 Six Nations, marking Italy's first-ever victory over England in 33 attempts. The loss represents England's thi...

item.title: Iranian Americans in Los Angeles Shift from Celebration to Concern Over Potential Chaos in Iran After Khamenei's Death
item.description: Following the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in U.S. and Israeli airstrikes, Iranian American communities in Los Angeles, especially in Westwood's 'Tehrangeles' area, initiall...

item.title: PM Modi Praises Om Birla for Managing Lok Sabha with Fairness and Patience
item.description: In a strong show of support just two days ahead of a resolution seeking his removal, Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla received commendation from Prime Minister Narendra Modi. During a virtual address at the...

item.title: KeNHA Clarifies Green Park Pedestrian Underpass Remains Safe after Rain, AI Photo Misleads Public
item.description: The Kenyan National Highways Authority (KeNHA) has moved swiftly to debunk a viral image claiming that the newly-built Green Park pedestrian underpass in Nairobi flooded after heavy rainfall. The phot...

item.title: US Declares Emergency to Expedite Bomb Shipments to Israel Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: The US State Department has invoked emergency authority to bypass Congress and sell more than 20,000 bombs to Israel, valued at nearly US$660 million, amid escalating conflict with Iran. Secretary of ...

item.title: Government Implements Measures to Support Distressed Municipalities
item.description: Deputy President Paul Mashatile has outlined ongoing government initiatives to stabilise municipalities facing persistent service delivery and governance challenges. Municipalities such as Ditsobotla ...

item.title: Governor Abiodun Urges Muslims to Practice Compassion and Service During Ramadan
item.description: Oga Dapo Abiodun, Ogun State Governor, don urge all Muslims make the spirit of Ramadan shine for their everyday life. Na during one special Ramadan Iftar wey the state government organise, dem use the...
